task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Hyundai Ioniq 5 (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $42600.00 and wholesale is $33160.00. Product features: Electric crossover with retro-futuristic design and 800V architecture. Reference: https://www.hyundaiusa.com/us/en/vehicles/ioniq-5

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Hyundai Ioniq 5. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Hyundai Ioniq 5. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
